comment: unit specs are excluded from ../tsconfig.json (the light e2e config lacks Nuxt's ambient auto-imports). this inherits the full Nuxt paths + pulls the auto-import globals (types/imports.d.ts) so the editor + vue-tsc resolve ~/ imports and composables' ref/useRuntimeConfig/etc, WITHOUT rooting nuxt.d.ts -> components.d.ts (which drags in the whole .vue graph)
